programmes.show_description: A tough detective (Dean Cain) will stop at nothing for vengeance after the murder of his wife.
Action-packed thriller with Bruce Willis. After a botched heist leaves her crime lord boss unhappy, a thief persuades her former lover to help her steal a shipment of rare and valuable gems.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A landscaper is accused of vandalizing a woman's yard after a dispute over finances.
A woman sues her teenage daughter and her boyfriend for allegedly totalling a car she was allowing her to borrow.
A woman sues her estranged son-in-law for money he received for housing while out of the country; she believes it should go to his wife and child.
A teenager's car is allegedly beaten with a bat when he admits to going out of his way to meet up with friends arguing over a girl.
When a man feels stiffed after a car deal, he is accused of taking out his frustration on a tenant by illegally evicting him.
A vehicle takes a severe 'knifing' when a woman vandalises her baby daddy's ex-girlfriend's vehicle.
The Judge cites a study naming the top 'biting' dogs, as she mediates a case involving the mauling death of a Terrier by a Pit Bull mix.
A woman sues her former hairdresser for an unpaid loan to hire a divorce attorney; she claims she was paying off the loan by styling her hair for free.
An alleged threat to report a dirt bike as stolen leads to a woman returning the bike to its owner despite being on time in her payments; she sues him for the return of payments she made.
Find out what's happening in London today with all the latest local news, opinions and events.
A Brooklyn woman turns to a N.Y. private eye for help tracking down a Russian beauty she believes robbed and killed her mother. Can they find her? Peter Van Sant investigates.
Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with stolen cash.
Bryan Whitelock killed a friend and his brother, later murdered his neighbour Wendy Buckney, and was sentenced to life with no parole.
In the US, Dr Milner's obsession led to the stalking of Tanya and Kenny. After court orders failed, he murdered Kenny and was sentenced to life in prison.

An astronaut stranded on a distant planet with no hope for rescue learns that a devastating nuclear war has killed his people back home.
Three National Guardsmen on manoeuvres near the site of the Battle of Little Big Horn are surprised to hear the sound of Indian war cries.
Crime thriller starring Mark Wahlberg. A former smuggler heads to Panama to protect his brother-in-law from a ruthless drug lord and to score millions of dollars in counterfeit bills.
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A Russian detective and a Chicago cop put aside their mutual mistrust to catch an escaped Soviet drug baron and bring him to justice.
Action thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A hitman and a police detective become unlikely partners when they join forces to seek revenge on the man who murdered both their partners.
Classic Hammer horror starring Christopher Lee. Two couples touring Eastern Europe ignore the dire warnings of locals and visit the castle home of the sinister Count Dracula.

Two Pit Bull Mastiffs allegedly drag their owner across the street in order to viciously attack another dog.
A generous boss loans his employees over $3,000 so they won't lose their home; when they fail to pay him back, he's forced to sue them.
A woman is accused of making outrageous statements to authorities when she tries to regain access to her illegally sublet apartment.
A woman is forced to evict her brother in order to sell her deceased father's home; he takes issue with the lawyer he hired to help him.
A boy's pet turtle, calls to the police and a controversial electric bill come into play when ex-fiancée's call it quits.
After children deny involvement in vandalising a neighbour's car, Judge Judy imparts an invaluable lesson.
A woman accused of stealing thousands from her cousin tries to clear her name by passing a polygraph test.
A home-based Internet business, a divorce, and an ex-employee caught in the middle come into play when ex-roommates fight over rent.
Claiming she made over $7,000 in car payments, a young woman sues her ex-stepfather after he repossesses her vehicle.

In 1994, Jason Mitchell strangled pensioners Arthur and Shirley Wilson, before returning to his father's house and dismembering his body.
Roger and Josie Hartland found themselves stalked by their new home's previous owner, a former resident of a Nazi breeding camp.
US model Kelsey Turner's 'Sugar Daddy' scheme turns deadly when she and boyfriend, Jon, murder Dr Burchard after financial betrayal and false accusations.
In the US, Ali Abulaban, a former airman, abused Ana, then killed her and her friend after she left him. He was convicted of two counts of first-degree murder.

A man mocked by his younger wife begs his scientist brother to give him an experimental youth serum - but the potion goes beyond its intended effect.
A retired watchmaker believes that his days are numbered when his beloved grandfather clock begins to wind down.
Thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A bereaved and alcoholic FBI agent in rehab discovers that a killer is targeting the patients - forcing him to pull himself together to prevent more deaths.
Action sequel, directed by and starring Sylvester Stallone. The bandana-wearing one-man army travels to Burma to rescue a party of missionaries from a sadistic military officer.
